title: New #1 open-source AI model is here!
summary: GLM 5.2 is presented as a leading open-source AI model capable of multimodal tasks including digital earth rendering, animation with voiceover, 3D model generation, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematics visualization. The model is accessible via web chat, can integrate with Claude, and offers a coding plan subscription.
writeup: AI Search profiles GLM 5.2, presented as a leading open-source AI model built for multimodal work. The demonstrations span digital earth rendering, animation with voiceover, 3D model generation, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematics visualization. Access runs through web chat, with integration into Claude and a coding plan subscription available. The framing matters because it positions an open-source release against closed competitors across a wide span of generative tasks.
